lowcode.model/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Replace deprecated source/target configuration with the modern release configuration for cross-compilation.
lowcode.model/pom.xml.why_exists: Using source/target is deprecated in newer compiler plugins; release is the standard for JDK 9+ module-aware compilation.
